title: Policy: Policies Applied - Restart the app
scenario: Device policies applied via admin portal remain locked/enforced after restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and log in to a tenant with a device already paired/connected.
2. From the admin portal, create and apply a device policy that locks specific settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
3. Close and re-launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Audio Settings and verify that settings affected by the policy are locked (grayed out or non-interactive).
5. Fully close the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe from recents or force stop).
6. From the admin portal, modify the existing device policy (e.g., change which settings are locked or adjust values).
7. Re-launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and log in again.

8. Navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Audio Settings and verify that the updated policy changes are properly applied (e.g., previously unlocked settings are now locked, or locked settings now reflect new values).
expected: After restarting the app, all device policies applied via the admin portal remain locked/enforced. After modifying the policy and restarting the app again, the updated policy changes are properly reflected in the app.
